content.full_text:
June 22, 2004

Matt Grocott
280 Shelford Avenue
San Carlos, CA 94070

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-134

Dear Mr. Grocott:

This letter concerns your request for written advice on the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act.1 After a careful review of the facts you have submitted, we decline to provide written advice to you at this time. Your questions involve analysis of facts which have already occurred, such that issuing written advice at this time would relate to past conduct which is prohibited by statute. (See regulation 18329(b)(8)(A) and (c)(4)(A), copy enclosed.)

Should you have any additional questions on this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosure
JWW:jg

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California Code of Regulations.
